description.value:
Frequency once per minute

Effect You announce your house affiliation, either by declaring it aloud (giving this ability the auditory trait) or openly displaying your house heraldry (giving this ability the visual trait). Until the beginning of your next turn, your weapon Strikes and spells deal an additional 1 damage to any creature that witnessed the display. If you're an expert in Cheliax Lore, Genealogy Lore, Heraldry Lore, Performance, or Warfare Lore, the additional damage increases to 2. The damage increases to 3 if you're a master in the skill or 4 if you're legendary in the skill.
